title: AI assistant
description: Answer common client questions on WhatsApp using your clinic knowledge base.

locked.title: Add-on not subscribed
locked.description: The AI assistant is part of your VetSaaS subscription. Contact support or check My subscription to enable it.

whatsapp_hint: Same number as in Outgoing queue.

knowledge.title: Knowledge base
knowledge.description: FAQs, hours, policies, and services the assistant will use to reply.

section_hints.faq: Frequently asked questions with ready answers. E.g. Do you handle emergencies?
section_hints.horario: Opening hours per branch or special days.
section_hints.servicio: Grooming, boarding, consultations and other services.
section_hints.contacto: Address, phones, social media and directions.
section_hints.general: General information that does not fit another category.

form.slug_hint: Generated from the title. You can edit it if needed.
form.content_placeholder: Write the answer the assistant should give...

delete.title: Delete entry
delete.description: Delete "{{title}}"? The assistant will stop using this information.

empty.no_records_description: Add FAQs, hours, and policies so the assistant can reply.
empty.no_results_description: Try another term or change the section filter.

conversations.title: WhatsApp chats
conversations.description: Review conversations and pause the assistant per number when staff replies manually.
conversations.hint_manual: If you reply from the clinic WhatsApp, the AI pauses automatically for that chat.
conversations.chat_empty: No messages in this chat yet.

empty.title: No conversations yet
empty.description: When a client writes on WhatsApp, they will appear here.
